scope: Task Thread first desktop shell batch covering #101, #102, #103, and #104

pre_implementation.admission_repair: fact_chain.mode changed to work-item + recovery-entry + derived status-surface with existing GH-101 entry points

worker_owned: bounded local fixes to renderer styles, Settings validation, App Settings UI, and smoke coverage
non_goals: workers did not write Loom carriers, issue bodies, PR bodies, commits, pushes, or GitHub state

delegations.task_goal: Review GH-101 renderer implementation for #101-#104 scope, UI boundary bugs, privacy risks, and test gaps.
non_goals: do not change GitHub or Loom carriers
delegations.validation_expectation: Report findings with file/line references and relevant verification commands.
delegations.integration_summary: Findings for 960px layout, Settings endpoint persistence, and smoke coverage were fixed by a bounded worker and revalidated.

delegations.task_goal: Review GH-101 carrier/docs/issue semantics, PR body requirements, and closeout risks.
non_goals: do not change GitHub or Loom carriers
delegations.validation_expectation: Report carrier gaps, PR metadata requirements, and closeout risks.
delegations.output_format: findings, semantic readback, PR body requirements, validation list
delegations.integration_summary: Missing GH-101 suite artifacts, stale progress, review scaffold, and placeholder boundary risks were integrated into suite carriers/progress and PR body requirements.

delegations.task_goal: Fix reviewer findings for 960px layout, Settings endpoint validation, and smoke coverage.
delegations.validation_expectation: Run npm run typecheck, npm run smoke, and git diff --check.
delegations.output_format: changed files, validation results, residual risks
delegations.integration_summary: Worker patch was read back by main thread and validated with typecheck, smoke, audit, diff check, and Loom gates.

commands.note: Runs build/typecheck, compiles Electron main/preload, builds the Vite renderer, verifies GH-101 Task Thread shell strings, and checks Settings malformed JSON fallback, valid endpoint normalization, and sensitive endpoint rejection.

review_findings_integrated.finding: 960px Electron minimum width could clip the three-column layout
review_findings_integrated.validation: npm run typecheck; npm run smoke; git diff --check

review_findings_integrated.finding: Settings boundary persisted arbitrary strings to localStorage
review_findings_integrated.validation: save validates and normalizes endpoints before localStorage writes; smoke covers sensitive endpoint rejection

review_findings_integrated.finding: Smoke lacked Settings persistence boundary coverage
review_findings_integrated.validation: smoke covers malformed stored JSON fallback, valid endpoint normalization, and sensitive endpoint rejection

known_gate_exception.classification: Loom build surface / suite CLI JSON consumption blocker
key_gaps: suite validation suite_cli_json_unavailable: tools/loom.py: Run the global `loom suite validate --target <repo> --item <item> --json` surface.
suite carrier validate CLI JSON unavailable
known_gate_exception.decision: Total dispatch allowed GH-101 PR creation without repairing Loom tools or adding repo-local tools/loom.py.

non_goals: no full Library or Browser management
